meaning: n.(民间传说中的)食人魔鬼,怪物,象鬼的人
examples: In the spacious hall, they found a splendid feast that had been prepared by the Ogre for some of his friends.
"You shall see, " replied the Ogre, and in an instant, he became a mouse and began to scamper about the floor.
It belonged to an ogre, the richest ever known, and all the lands through which the king had passed that morning belonged to him.
Is one of the prerequisites for successful organizations that they have an Ogre at the helm?
The ogre is still there, even if for the time being it is safely chained.
